prediction_ref.short_label: "Agent Control Plane" as new hyperscaler battleground (Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform, AgentCore, OpenAI Workspace Agents)

validation_rows.evidence_summary: Apr 28 Novita Sandbox launches as the first commercial OpenClaw + Hermes agent-runtime sandbox; AWS Bedrock AgentCore Runtime adds Node.js as its second managed language; SuiteCloud Agent Skills lands at SuiteConnect SF as the first non-foundation-lab vendor shipping skills-as-a-product with a signed-distribution security frame. The control-plane category is widening, but no SSO/identity provider treats agents as first-class objects yet today.

reference_links.label: PR Newswire - Novita AI Launches Sandbox
Knowledge Hub Media - SuiteConnect 2026 Agent Skills

bridge.narrative: Today's parallel shipments — Novita Sandbox, Bedrock AgentCore Runtime Node.js, and Oracle's SuiteCloud Agent Skills — all reinforce the structural premise that the agent-runtime layer is hardening into a single control plane category. The signal is moderate: vendors are shipping mitigation and packaging primitives, but the SSO-treats-agents-as-first-class step the prediction calls for is not yet visible in any identity provider's release notes.
bridge.remaining_gap: An Okta / Entra ID / Workspace SSO release that registers agent identifiers as first-class principals alongside humans and service accounts.

prediction_ref.short_label: 27B Dense + 1M context as de-facto standard enterprise local-LLM in H2 2026

validation_rows.evidence_summary: Qwen3.6-Max-Preview + Qwen3.6-27B + Qwen3.6-35B-A3B carry forward at top SWE-bench Pro / SkillsBench / SciCode scores with 260K context and preserve_thinking mode; Renovateqr's Apr 2026 roundup catalogues DeepSeek V4, Kimi K2.6, and the Qwen 3.6 series as the converging Chinese open-weight wave; Anthropic's Apr 30 retirement of the Sonnet 4.5/4 1M-context beta forces customers onto Sonnet 4.6 / Opus 4.6 — proprietary 1M as standard pricing.

reference_links.label: Renovateqr - Chinese AI Models in April 2026
Pasquale Pillitteri - Anthropic Retires the 1M Context Beta

bridge.narrative: The Qwen 3.6 family at flagship-grade coding ability with 260K context and Apache 2.0 licensing is exactly the open-weight package the prediction's 27B-Dense + 1M-context thesis rests on; today's evidence carries it forward without breaking new ground on the single-RTX-4090 deployment frame. Anthropic retiring the 1M-context beta on the proprietary side is parallel reinforcement for context-length convergence.
bridge.remaining_gap: A Mistral / Meta / Gemma 20-30B Dense release with 1M context shipping under Apache or Llama-style licensing.

prediction_ref.short_label: AI agent security extends to third-party-vendor boundary + URL-naming entropy (post-Mythos contractor incident)

validation_rows.evidence_summary: SuiteCloud Agent Skills at SuiteConnect SF Apr 28 ships with a signed-distribution security frame, the first major non-foundation-lab vendor publishing skills with provenance attestation as the default. No fresh contractor / preview-URL / leaked-data incident landed today, but the signed-distribution baseline is exactly the third-party-vendor security normalization the prediction anticipated.

reference_links.label: Knowledge Hub Media - SuiteConnect 2026 Agent Skills

bridge.narrative: Oracle's SuiteCloud Agent Skills is the first non-foundation-lab vendor to publish skills-as-a-product with signed-distribution as the default security frame. That's the same shape the prediction's third-party-vendor-boundary thesis projected, applied one layer up at the skills marketplace rather than at the preview-URL surface. Useful but partial.
bridge.remaining_gap: A SOC 2 Type II + FedRAMP Moderate + Frontier Model Forum baseline becoming explicit in a frontier-lab early-access vendor agreement, plus randomized preview-endpoint URL rotation.

prediction_ref.short_label: 1M context as default open-weight era arrives by Q3 2026; vector DBs forced to redefine as long-context cache layers

validation_rows.evidence_summary: CVE-2026-40967 Spring AI FilterExpressionConverter Injection (CVSS 8.6, Apr 28) is the first 2026 CVE squarely in the LLM-tooling supply chain at the RAG query plane — vector-store query languages with unescaped keys/values. DeepSeek V4 carry-forward holds the 1M-context dense / Hybrid-Attention frame. PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971) layers shared asymmetric KV-pool compression on multi-agent inference, demonstrating long-context cache architecture without classic vector DB.

bridge.narrative: The Spring AI vector-DB query-plane CVE is direct evidence that vendors are repositioning vector stores into the inference-server-class attack surface — the architectural shift the prediction anticipated. PolyKV's shared asymmetric KV-pool plus DeepSeek V4's native 1M context fill in the long-context-cache replacement architecture. Strong signal across multiple legs of the thesis.
bridge.remaining_gap: An open-weight 1M-context release that explicitly retires its bundled vector-DB recommendation in favor of long-context dump-and-prune.

No fresh production-record release today, but the OEM-adopted-records frame holds.

bridge.remaining_gap: A VW / Bosch / Mercedes / Foxconn / TSMC / Toyota RFP that explicitly folds 24h continuous operation, 1-week MTBF, and 90%+ autonomous completion into procurement.

Mag 7 prints landed in an 80-second window with MSFT $82.9B (+18%) / Azure +40% / explicit $37B AI run-rate disclosure (+123%); GOOGL $109.9B (+22%) / Cloud $20B (+63%) / +6% AH; META -7% AH on capex shortfall + user-growth miss; AMZN mixed. prediction_ref.short_label: Frontier AI lab × Tier-1 cloud capacity capture splits field cleanly by Q3 2026 — training oligopoly = 3 clouds, inference = layered

Cerebras IPO mid-May at $22B-$25B (24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration), $510M 2025 revenue, $20B+/750MW OpenAI deal through 2028 with Morgan Stanley/Citi/Barclays/UBS underwriters.

bridge.narrative: Microsoft's $37B AI run-rate disclosure is the cleanest single-line confirmation of the three-cloud training-oligopoly framing — the disclosure precedent is now public. Cerebras's mid-May IPO concentrates the inference-side specialization onto a single fourth-hyperscaler-candidate trajectory, which is exactly the layered-inference shape the prediction projects.
bridge.remaining_gap: An Oracle Cloud / IBM / CoreWeave statement explicitly conceding inference-only specialization, plus a Tier-1 frontier-lab × cloud-capacity contract that matches the GCP/AWS/Azure exclusivity scale.

prediction_ref.short_label: Inference servers become primitive supply chain — first AI Infra-specific CVE class with NVD tagging by Q3 2026; OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 promotes Inference Server Template/Loader RCE to top-3
